meaning: adj.(中欧国家)列支敦士登的
examples: Within the Alps in Central Europe is Liechtenstein, a tiny country of about 30,000 people who speak mostly German.
Liechtenstein uses the same money as its neighbor Switzerland, but it has been an independent country since the 1860s.
Germany has beaten up tiny Liechtenstein over secrecy.
Russia's next qualifying games are against Azerbaijan on 28 March and Liechtenstein on 1 April.
Despite his concerns about the pitch, Bellamy was happy to have sneaked the win over Liechtenstein.
